title: The Box Model
description: Apply padding, margin, and border to a box element to understand the CSS box model
html: I am a box with padding, margin, and a border!

hints.text: The box model has three layers around content: padding (inside), border (middle), and margin (outside).
Use 'padding: 20px', 'margin: 10px', and 'border: 2px solid black' on the .box selector.
